title: The Metamedium Chronicle
subtitle: Summer 2026: Real-Time Latency & Linguistic Architectures
description: A broadsheet exploring real-time generative AI installations, the archive crisis of live digital art, and the comparative linguistics of computational aesthetics.

articles.subtitle: Decentralizing the physical form in experimental modern art.
